title: Popuni Prazninu Placeholder Tekstom

solutions.name: index
solutions.contents:
Hello World

CatPhotoApp

Kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff

Hello World

CatPhotoApp

Kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff

tests.text: Vas p element treba da sadrzi prvih nekoliko reci datog "kitty ipsum" teksta.

description:
Web developeri cesto koriste lorem ipsum tekst kao placeholder tekst. Lorem ipsum potice iz nasumicno izabranih delova poznatog dela Cicerona iz starog Rima.

Lorem ipsum se koristi kao placeholder tekst jos od 16. veka, a ta praksa se nastavila i na webu.

Dobro, pet vekova je sasvim dovoljno. Posto pravimo CatPhotoApp, koristite nesto sto se zove "kitty ipsum" tekst.
instructions: Zamenite tekst unutar svog p elementa prvih nekoliko reci sledeceg kitty ipsum teksta: Kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff.
